title: pyrus angusta
intro: Pyrus angusta, also known as the small-fruited wild pear or wild pear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Pyrus angusta include its potential to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, as well as its possible role in supporting cardiovascular health and immune function. Herbal preparations of Pyrus angusta are typically made from its leaves, flowers, or roots, and can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or infusions.
